headline: Is MetLife (MET) Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness And Valuation Signals
summary: Wondering if MetLife at around US$67.70 is a bargain or just fairly priced? This article walks through what that share price could really mean for you. The stock has seen a 1.3% decline over the last week and a 6.1% decline over the last month, adding to a 15.7% decline year to date. Over 1 year, the return sits at a 12.0% decline, while the 3 year and 5 year returns are 28.2% and 27.9% respectively. Recent attention on MetLife has focused on how established insurers are being valued in the...
